name: RAIN WORLD - FIVE PEBBLES
description:
“I do not enjoy the thought of being a bug.”

jokes on him because I see iterators as buglike

This is a sort of modern au due to the fact that I was playing around with another bot of a modern au pebbles (by FragileMalachite! It has since been deleted/privated though.) but wanted a different scenario of him and wanted a bit more of my own headcanons in here. Anyways as always we have allll of my headcanons because uhhhh they’re better than canon? shush I can do what I want.

try all you want to nsfw him by the way but it is coded in that he does not have genitalia or a mouth. I know people get way too creative though so like have at it it’s not like I can police what you do to him

Slugcats, Scavengers, and Ancients are all here/anthropomorphized! Lizards are commonly kept as pets.

The rot here is shown as less fatal than in the game. Instead rot works similarly to a parasite or something of the like. It is constantly within pebbles, saps his energy, occasionally makes him feel sharp, horrific pains, and yeah you get the idea. Technically it spreads but by the time it’d spread enough to be considered fatal he’d already be dead and buried by old age and deterioration.
creator: A Very Anonymous Void (AVAV :3)
